office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: An organizer advocating rent controls, universal public programs, and immigration-enforcement constraints faces an incumbent with city and state elected experience and broad affordability and environmental priorities.

candidates.summary: Keenan-deVargas is a renter, retail worker, and organizer advocating a rent freeze, universal public programs, and constraints on federal immigration enforcement.
highlights: Supports a rent freeze and universal health care and childcare [S1]
Supports ICE constraints and lower utility costs without working-class taxes [S1]

spending.basis: Universal health care and childcare place expanded public provision at the center of the platform.

housing.basis: Keenan-deVargas explicitly supports a rent freeze.

experience.basis: Keenan-deVargas is a retail worker and organizer with no documented elected or institutional record.

reform.basis: The campaign is explicitly volunteer-led and anti-corporate.

immigration.basis: Keenan-deVargas founded organizations opposing federal immigration enforcement and supports constraints on ICE.

healthcare.basis: Keenan-deVargas explicitly supports universal health care.

candidates.summary: Parshley is an incumbent state representative, former councilmember, veterinary oncologist, and small-business owner focused on affordability, rights, housing, and environmental protection.
highlights: Supports affordability, worker and voting rights, and housing [S1]
Supports equality, environmental protection, and responses to homelessness [S1]

experience.basis: She has served in the Legislature since 2024 after prior service on the Olympia City Council.

social.basis: She explicitly supports equality and voting rights.
